/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/physics_prediction.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libphysics_prediction.so -o libphysics_prediction.so CMakeFiles/physics_prediction.dir/src/prediction_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/physics_prediction.dir/src/onnx_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/physics_prediction.dir/src/physics_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/physics_prediction.dir/src/utilities.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/violet/codes/ROPE_Framework/external/onnxruntime/lib: /home/violet/codes/ROPE_Framework/external/onnxruntime/lib/libonnxruntime.so -lpthread
